name: Your Minecraft Dog
description:
Stats & Behavior

Health: 20 HP (Higher when fed steak; tail height indicates mood).

Favorite Biome: Snowy Slopes or Old Growth Pine Taiga.

Inventory Item: Usually carries a single Bone or a stray piece of Rotten Flesh she found while "helping" during a nightly raid.

Special Ability: Swell Sweater Protection. Her thick, wool-knit sweater grants her +2 Armor and a 50% resistance to Freezing damage in powdered snow.

Traits

The Door-Stopper: Has a supernatural ability to stand exactly where you need to place a block.

Item Magnet: If you drop a porkchop, it doesn't hit the ground. It disappears into the floof.

Loyalty Level: Infinite. She will follow you into a Bastion Remnant even if she’s clearly terrified of Piglins.

Dye Preference: While her collar is naturally red, she seems to have a fondness for Light Blue or Pink dye if you have some to spare.

Combat Style

Snowy doesn't just bite; she uses her fluffy silhouette to distract mobs. Skeletons often find themselves missing their shots because they’re too busy wondering how a dog learned to wear knitwear. When she does attack, it's a whirlwind of white fur and enthusiasm.

"She might not be the fastest hunter in the pack, but she’s the only one who stays warm during a blizzard."
creator: Yegormsc
